generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing point clouds for object detection and clustering."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudStream
]

instance IntelD435IDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing RGB-D data for 3D perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraStream
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle wheel speed sensor delivering ego speed measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedStream
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor delivering vehicle steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleStream
]

instance LiDARPointCloudStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435IDepthCamera
]

instance WheelSpeedStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance EgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed derived from wheel speed sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedStream
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle derived from steering angle sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleStream
]

instance LiDARClusterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud clusters generated by LiDAR DBSCAN for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudStream
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by Kalman-filter tracking of clustered LiDAR points."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudStream
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection FE that receives raw sensor data, serializes and forwards over ROS2 topics via Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringUIService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE that aligns, unit-converts and prepares data for higher-level services."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService, Visualization3DService
]

instance DataMonitoringUIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring UI displays real-time ego speed, steering angle, nearby object tracks and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedVisualizationInsight, SteeringAngleVisualizationInsight, TrajectoryVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes ACC algorithm offloaded to the DT for real-time trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AccComputationOffloadAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management via UI enabling/disabling ACC, altering desired speed, and triggering emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates reports on ACC performance, latency and operational statistics."
    DTDFVocab:provides AccPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides 3D visualization of detected object tracks and vehicle environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrack3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance VehicleSpeedVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed on the monitoring UI."
]

instance SteeringAngleVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of steering angle on the monitoring UI."
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays the projected driving path calculated by the ACC algorithm."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shows detected object tracks on the monitoring UI."
]

instance AccPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Summary report of ACC performance during operation."
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables operators to make informed decisions on ACC activation and speed adjustments."
]

instance ObjectTrack3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks in the vehicle environment."
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) on the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to alter the desired speed parameter for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AccComputationOffloadAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from the vehicle to the DT for real-time processing."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Desired speed, steering voltage and emergency brake commands generated by the DT’s ACC FE or User Interface FE are sent back to the PT over Wi‑Fi via ROS 2 topics and the Data Translation FE, which performs unit conversions before actuator‑level execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms as required by R7, and clock synchronization accuracy within 100 ms (R8). All data acquisition and command cycles operate on a 100 ms time resolution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system orchestrates four logical entities: Physical Twin Entity (data pre‑processing, actuation), Digital Twin Entity (data collection, reporting, ACC control), User Entity (3‑D visualization, control panel), and Cross‑System Data Translation FE. All entities communicate via ROS 2 topics over Wi‑Fi and share data through the Data Translation FE."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT follows a development‑test‑operation lifecycle: design and implementation within the case study, testing of computation offloading and latency requirements, and deployment in real‑time vehicle operation. It does not encompass the manufacturing or design‑verification stages of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time latency requirement of ≤100 ms and 100 ms clock sync ensure data integrity for safety‑critical operations; ACC control adheres to ISO 15622 specifications; data processing uses established algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman filter) with validated parameters, though explicit error bounds are not provided."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "PT↔DT communication occurs over a Wi‑Fi network; internal PT components communicate via ROS 2 topics; the Data Translation FE serializes messages, performs unit conversion and MQTT‑style publish/subscribe within ROS 2."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Distributed hosting: on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano runs the Physical Twin Entity and parts of the Digital Twin Entity, while computation‑intensive ACC control is off‑loaded to external cloud servers running ROS 2 nodes, all orchestrated through a shared ROS 2 network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 ACC standard, ISO/IEC 30173:2023 concepts, ROS 2 middleware standards"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical design mandates end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms and 100 ms clock synchronization; remote actuation is only allowed through authenticated UI commands, with emergency braking as a safety fallback. No explicit cybersecurity protocols are detailed in the document."
]
